input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: use the test method f.8.7.4 or the calculation method f.8.7.5 to prove the force requirement

            rule F.8.7.3: Use the Test Method F.8.7.4 or the Calculation Method F.8.7.5 to prove the force requirement
F.8.7.3 Use the Test Method F.8.7.4 or the Calculation Method F.8.7.5 to prove the force requirement

final_answer: Use the Test Method F.8.7.4 or the Calculation Method F.8.7.5 to prove the force requirement
